title: next-dart neutral tree node
description: A single node in the neutral declarative tree served by next-dart. Nodes serialise as {type, props?, children?, events?}; omitted fields mean empty.

type.description: Catalog widget name (Text, Column, Card, Padding, Image, Button) or a composite component name registered with the app.

props.description: Named widget properties. Each value is a JSON scalar (string, number, boolean) or an argRef object (used only inside composite component bodies).

events.description: Map of event name to action reference. E.g. {"onPressed": {"action": "inc"}}.

actionRef.description: A reference from a node event to a named server (or client) action.

args.description: Optional arguments forwarded to the action handler. Values may be scalars or argRefs.

argRef.description: A reference to a composite-component parameter. Serialises as {"$arg": "paramName"}. Valid only inside a component body (NdComponentDef.body).

$arg.description: Name of the component parameter declared in NdComponentDef.params.
